bullet_points: Define a 20% held-out validation split by holding out 20 of the 101 cosmological models.

Implement a batch-processing loop (batch size 32-64) to add noise to training maps (3 independent noise realizations per map) and compute WST coefficients using kymatio (Scattering2D, J=4, L=8) on GPU.
Average WST features across the 3 noise realizations for each map.
Compute empirical mean and standard deviation of WST coefficients across the training set for normalization.
Save the normalized WST features, normalization statistics, and the validation split indices to disk.
Print the output feature dimensionality.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Compute Wavelet Scattering Transform (WST) coefficients for the training set and define the validation split.

bullet_points: Load the normalized WST features, labels, and validation split.
Implement a zuko MAF model with at least 8 masked autoregressive transforms, 256 hidden dimensions, and dropout layers (rate ~0.1) between hidden layers.
Train the flow using negative log-likelihood loss, implementing nuisance-augmentation by resampling nuisance parameters (T_AGN, f_0, Δz) from their priors while keeping cosmological parameters fixed.
Monitor NLL on the validation set, implement early stopping (patience 10), and save the best model checkpoint.
Save a diagnostic plot of training and validation loss curves.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Train a Masked Autoregressive Flow (MAF) to model the conditional density of WST features.

bullet_points: Load the test maps and compute their WST features using the normalization statistics from Step 1.
Perform inference using the trained CNF with MC Dropout (5 forward passes) to estimate mean NLL and epistemic uncertainty.
Construct synthetic OoD samples from the held-out validation set (e.g., via power spectrum perturbation) to compute the partial AUC validation score.
Generate the submission.json file and the submission.zip archive.
Print the validation score and NLL distribution statistics for the InD validation set.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Compute OoD scores for the test set and calculate the validation score.

bullet_points: Report the exact numerical validation score (val_score), WST feature dimensionality, number of training samples, and MAF architecture parameters.
Discuss the effectiveness of WST in capturing non-Gaussian baryonic signatures and the robustness of the model to nuisance parameter variations.
Analyze the MC Dropout uncertainty statistics and training/validation NLL values.
Compare these results against the known baseline scores from the competition starting kit to contextualize the improvement.
Summarize findings and provide insights into the OoD detection capabilities.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Write the Results section of the research report.
